assignments.name: 7 Yellow Creative Writing Portfolio Draft 2 - Persuasive Writing
assignments.description: Writing Task Compose a reply to President Ziya's letter below, arguing that it is unacceptable to allow children to live and work in such conditions. You should aim to write 400 words and use the rhetorical devices listed here: rhetorical question, statistics, emotive language
